store.name: prompts.chat Extension
store.tagline: The official browser extension for prompts.chat.

apps.name: prompts.chat Extension
apps.subtitle: AI Prompt Library for Your Browser
apps.description: The official browser extension for prompts.chat — one-click access to the world's largest prompt collection on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and 40+ AI platforms.
apps.longDescription: The official browser extension for prompts.chat. Run prompts on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek, Grok, Perplexity, and 40+ AI platforms with one click. Features include smart filtering by category, tags, and prompt type (Text, Image, Audio, Video), variable customization with real-time preview, side panel mode, dark/light mode, syntax highlighting for structured prompts, and quick copy to clipboard. Available for Chrome and Firefox.
features: One-click prompt execution on 40+ AI platforms
Smart filtering by category, tags, and prompt type
Side panel mode for browsing while using prompts
